description_long: This apartment building consists of two large, rectangular towers connected by a skybridge and an arched lower walkway. Both towers feature flat, red gabled roofs and are clad in light blue and white facades with rows of evenly spaced windows. The lower levels are slightly recessed and have larger window panels, while the upper floors display a repetitive, grid-like window arrangement. The connecting skybridge is enclosed and features a series of small windows, while the arch below provides a passageway at ground level. Small patches of greenery are visible at the base, suggesting landscaped surroundings. The overall design is modern, functional, and emphasizes symmetry and accessibility.
description: A modern, twin-tower apartment building with red roofs, light blue and white facades, and a connecting skybridge over an arched walkway.
description_view_0: Two rectangular towers with red roofs and a visible skybridge connecting them, showing the repetitive window pattern and landscaped base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the skybridge, arched walkway, and the main entrance area labeled 'GEDUNG PASCASARJANA'.
description_view_2: Rear view of the twin towers, focusing on the back facades and the connecting skybridge, with less emphasis on the entrance.
description_view_3: Side view showing the full length of the skybridge and the archway beneath, with both towers' side facades visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a highly regular, grid-like pattern with even spacing and alignment across all floors, creating a symmetrical and uniform appearance.
